_note: Source of truth for deal records. Real data is gitignored (*.local.*). This is the blank schema only. Reconciled to shared/pipeline-engine.md (canonical) in P23: deal_type enum, per-deliverable FTC, compensation, usage_rights, exclusivity, and invoice states now match the engine. account_ref replaces account_id; quality_verdict replaces quality_gate_result. contract_ref links to a record in pipeline/contracts/; raw contract_text lives only in the .local file, never committed.
